english translation text: Haye Sajjad Chalay Shaam, Khuda Khair Karay Oh Sajjad (a.s.)is on his way to Shaam, May Alláh make all wellEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Haye Sajjad Chalay Shaam, Khuda Khair Karay
@HujjatELC
english translation text: Oh Sajjad (a.s.) is on his way to Shaam, May Alláh make all well

urdu transliteration text:
Galay Main Tauq Hay Aur Bariyan Hain Pearon Main.Diya Hain Shaam Kay Logo Nay Ye Inaam, Khuda Khair Karay
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
He has a cuff around his neck, his feet are chained,
The people of Shaam, have given him this reward,
May Allah make all well

urdu transliteration text:
Woh Jis Kay Saar Say Rida Bhi Kabhi Sarak Jaye.To Maray Sharam Kay Suraj Waheen Palat Jaye.Sharabiyon Say Howi Hay Woh Hum Kalam.Khuda Khair Karay
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
If the veil just moved from their head slightly,
then the sun would feel embarrassed and set for them,
She had to face up to the drunk men,
May Allah make all well

urdu transliteration text:
Tamam Shearon Kay Deevar O Dar Sajaye Hain.Khari Hain Auratain Haaton Main Sang Uthaye Hain.Kiya Hay Jashan-e-Fatah Ka Ye Ahtamam.Khuda Khair Karay.
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
All the walls and boundaries of the town have been decorated,
The ladies are standing, carrying their weights in their hands,
They have celebrated the end of their victory,
May Allah make all well

The calamities that befell the daughters of Ali,
In the strange land they bore countless difficulties,
May Allah make all well

urdu transliteration text:
banake qaidi aulade ali ko laaye hai,ye shor barpa hai aae hai baaghi aae hai,macha hai shaam ke logo me kohraam khuda khair.
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
They have brought the children of Ali as prisoners,
There was an uproar, the prisoners have arrived,
There was an uproar amidst the people of Shaam,
May Allah make all well

He will bring the sword of Ali with him,
He will avenge the killings by Yazid,
May Allah make all well

In the bazaar of Shaam, Zainab is standing without a veil,
This is such a difficult moment for the one who was unwell (Imam Sajjad),
The bazaar is full of people,

The head of Ghazi (Hazrat Abbas) trembles on the spear,
May Allah make all well
